# Reflector-proposed rule: `{scheme_id}`

> human reviewer.** Reject by closing — the reflector will read the
> rejection note and avoid re-proposing this cluster for 14 days (unless the
> evidence count doubles).

**`{scheme_id}`** · confidence `{confidence}`

## Rationale

{rationale}

## Cluster

- **cluster_id**: `{cluster_id}`
- **FN count**: {fn_count}

## Pre-merge checks (all passed before this PR was opened)

- [x] identity_features — no card/device/merchant/ip/bin literals in predicate
- [x] holdout_precision — meets floor
- [x] fp_cap — fire rate on legit traffic below cap
- [x] redundancy — no existing rule covers > 70% of cited FNs
- [x] replay regression — seed-scheme recalls unchanged

## Human review required (CODEOWNERS gates merge on `skills/fraud-rules/rules/**`)

- [ ] Docstring accurately names the scheme an analyst would recognize
- [ ] Predicate generalizes — would catch novel cases, not just the cited ones
- [ ] Spot-check 3 cited evidence cases against the rule's logic
- [ ] No better path via *editing* an existing rule
